creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
They need some changes before committing, as attached.  Next time
please note the following things when you make a port:

- A port should use PTHREAD_CFLAGS and PTHREAD_LIBS instead of
hardcoding -lc_r, -D_THREAD_SAFE, -pthread etc. so that it builds on
both CURRENT and STABLE.

- A port should not hardcode C optimization flags but should leave it
to users, unless you are sure it doesn't build a working binary
without specific flags.

- The RCS tag you put for the first import is $FreeBSD$, not $FreeBSD: $.


By the way, what about making dcc a separate port that irchat-pj-* and
liece-* depend on?  All those four ports install ${LOCALBASE}/bin/dcc
and it will be mercilessly removed when any of them is deinstalled...

-- 
                     /
                    /__  __            Akinori.org / MUSHA.org
                   / )  )  ) )  /     FreeBSD.org / Ruby-lang.org
Akinori MUSHA aka / (_ /  ( (__(  @ iDaemons.org / and.or.jp

"Freeze this moment a little bit longer, make each impression
  a little bit stronger..  Experience slips away -- Time stand still"

diff -ru1 .orig/irchat-pj-emacs20/Makefile ./irchat-pj-emacs20/Makefile
--- .orig/irchat-pj-emacs20/Makefile	Sat May  5 20:02:45 2001
+++ ./irchat-pj-emacs20/Makefile	Sat May  5 20:05:54 2001
@@ -4,3 +4,3 @@
 #
-# $FreeBSD: $
+# $FreeBSD$
 #
@@ -16,11 +16,11 @@
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/share/emacs/site-lisp/pure/pure-make.el:${PORTSDIR}/irc/pure-${EMACS_PORT_NAME}
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/${LISPDIR:S,/${PORTNAME}$,/pure,}/pure-make.el:${PORTSDIR}/irc/pure-${EMACS_PORT_NAME}
 
 EMACS_PORT_NAME?=	emacs20
-LISPDIR?=       ${EMACS_LIBDIR}/site-lisp/${PORTNAME}
+LISPDIR?=	${EMACS_LIBDIR}/site-lisp/${PORTNAME}
 ETCDIR=		share/doc/${PORTNAME}
 
-LDFLAGS=	-pthread
-CFLAGS=		-O2 -DUSE_PTHREAD -DENABLE_PTHREAD_ATTR
-MAKE_ENV+=	LDFLAGS=${LDFLAGS}
+LDFLAGS=	${PTHREAD_LIBS}
+CFLAGS+=	${PTHREAD_CFLAGS} -DUSE_PTHREAD -DENABLE_PTHREAD_ATTR
+MAKE_ENV+=	LDFLAGS="${LDFLAGS}"
 
diff -ru1 .orig/irchat-pj-xemacs21-mule/Makefile ./irchat-pj-xemacs21-mule/Makefile
--- .orig/irchat-pj-xemacs21-mule/Makefile	Sat May  5 20:02:45 2001
+++ ./irchat-pj-xemacs21-mule/Makefile	Sat May  5 20:01:14 2001
@@ -4,3 +4,3 @@
 #
-# $FreeBSD: $
+# $FreeBSD$
 #
diff -ru1 .orig/pure-emacs20/Makefile ./pure-emacs20/Makefile
--- .orig/pure-emacs20/Makefile	Sat May  5 20:02:45 2001
+++ ./pure-emacs20/Makefile	Sat May  5 20:01:23 2001
@@ -4,3 +4,3 @@
 #
-# $FreeBSD: $
+# $FreeBSD$
 #
diff -ru1 .orig/pure-xemacs21-mule/Makefile ./pure-xemacs21-mule/Makefile
--- .orig/pure-xemacs21-mule/Makefile	Sat May  5 20:02:45 2001
+++ ./pure-xemacs21-mule/Makefile	Sat May  5 20:01:33 2001
@@ -4,3 +4,3 @@
 #
-# $FreeBSD: $
+# $FreeBSD$
 #
